title: Trump Says He Has Agreed to a 2-Week Cease-Fire With Iran
summary_full: President Trump announced the deal hours after threatening that a “whole civilization will die tonight” if Iran did not allow commercial vessels to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: President Trump announced the deal hours after threatening that a “whole civilization will die tonight” if Iran did not allow commercial vessels to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump Says He Has Agreed to a 2-Week Cease-Fire With Iran
